Draws lines on a Pebble app window, with metadata and compile rules for the "draw_lines" app.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Draws horizontal, vertical, and diagonal lines on a Pebble app window with profiling.

## Files
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "draw_lines" app, including UUID, version, and target platforms.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Default rules to compile a Pebble project with options for app and worker binaries.
